incident_summary: Microbial contamination in Lactose Monohydrate lot LOT-26484 from PharmChem Ltd — total aerobic count 997 CFU/g against NMT 237 CFU/g specification.
root_cause_detail: Supplier warehouse roof leak during storm allowed water ingress to storage area — affected bags not identified and segregated before shipment.
corrective_action: Lot rejected. All batches manufactured with this lot tested for bioburden impact. Supplier GMP audit initiated immediately. Alternative supplier lot sourced for ongoing production.
preventive_action: Microbial testing extended to all incoming lots of this excipient (previously tested quarterly). Supplier required to provide batch microbiological testing certificate with every shipment.
effectiveness_check: Zero microbial OOS events from incoming materials for 12 months. Annual supplier audit confirms adequate warehouse controls.
